summary.en: Bolivia's IEC-aligned regulatory framework through IBNORCA (Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad) references IEC 62920 (EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment in PV power systems) as the dedicated EMC standard for solar PV inverters. IEC 61000-3-2 (Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase) applies for harmonic emission limits. AE (Autoridad de Fiscalización de Electricidad y Tecnología Nuclear) licensing and ENDE/distributor grid-connection applications in practice require EMC compliance evidence referenced to IEC standards. No standalone Bolivia-specific EMC regulation for solar inverters exists independently of the IEC-referenced IBNORCA/AE framework.
summary.zh: 玻利维亚通过IBNORCA（玻利维亚标准化与质量研究所）建立的IEC对齐监管框架，将IEC 62920（光伏发电系统电力变换设备的EMC要求和测试方法）作为太阳能光伏逆变器的专用EMC标准。IEC 61000-3-2（每相输入电流不超过16 A的设备谐波电流发射限值）适用于谐波发射限值。AE（电力与核技术监督局）许可和ENDE/分销商并网申请在实践中需要参引IEC标准的EMC合规证据。玻利维亚目前没有独立于IBNORCA/AE的IEC参引框架之外的太阳能逆变器专用EMC法规。
summary.zht: 玻利維亞通過IBNORCA（玻利維亞標準化與質量研究所）建立的IEC對齊監管框架，將IEC 62920（光伏發電系統電力變換設備的EMC要求和測試方法）作為太陽能光伏逆變器的專用EMC標準。IEC 61000-3-2（每相輸入電流不超過16 A的設備諧波電流發射限值）適用於諧波發射限值。AE（電力與核技術監督局）許可和ENDE/分銷商併網申請在實踐中需要參引IEC標準的EMC合規證據。玻利維亞目前沒有獨立於IBNORCA/AE的IEC參引框架之外的太陽能逆變器專用EMC法規。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model. Confirm whether Bolivia's 230/400 V grid voltage conditions require retesting compared to results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions — voltage differences may affect conducted emission and harmonic measurement results. Verify the current IEC 62920 edition adopted under IBNORCA's NB framework directly with IBNORCA before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 从ILAC认可实验室获取针对具体逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。确认玻利维亚230/400 V电网电压条件是否需要相比在中国220/380 V电网条件下获得的结果重新测试——电压差异可能影响传导发射和谐波测量结果。在确定测试方案前，直接向IBNORCA核验IBNORCA的NB框架下采纳的现行IEC 62920版本。
gap.zht: 從ILAC認可實驗室獲取針對具體逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。確認玻利維亞230/400 V電網電壓條件是否需要相比在中國220/380 V電網條件下獲得的結果重新測試——電壓差異可能影響傳導發射和諧波測量結果。在確定測試方案前，直接向IBNORCA核驗IBNORCA的NB框架下採納的現行IEC 62920版本。

target.en: Mandatory in practice for AE licensing and ENDE/distributor grid-connection project submissions under Bolivia's IEC-aligned regulatory framework; required by utility-scale and donor-financed project procurement specifications.
target.zh: 在玻利维亚IEC对齐监管框架下的AE许可和ENDE/分销商并网项目提交中实际为强制；公用事业规模和捐助方融资项目采购规格要求。
target.zht: 在玻利維亞IEC對齊監管框架下的AE許可和ENDE/分銷商併網項目提交中實際為強制；公用事業規模和捐助方融資項目採購規格要求。

cn.en: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 EMC requirements are part of a recommended national standard; CNAS-lab testing is available but not directly accepted for Bolivia regulatory purposes.
cn.zh: 自愿——GB/T 37408-2021 EMC要求属于推荐性国家标准；CNAS实验室测试可用，但不被直接接受用于玻利维亚监管目的。
cn.zht: 自願——GB/T 37408-2021 EMC要求屬於推薦性國家標準；CNAS實驗室測試可用，但不被直接接受用於玻利維亞監管目的。

source.note: IBNORCA official website; specific NB/IEC 62920 and NB/IEC 61000-3-2 adoption status and AE EMC licensing requirements should be confirmed directly with IBNORCA and AE before finalising the compliance package.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy Bolivia's IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project submission to AE or ENDE/distributor. Confirm whether Bolivia's 230/400 V voltage conditions require retesting compared to test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Verify current IBNORCA NB adoption of IEC 62920 and AE EMC licensing requirements directly with IBNORCA and AE.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足玻利维亚的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向AE或ENDE/分销商提交项目前，从ILAC认可实验室获取针对具体逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。确认玻利维亚230/400 V电压条件是否需要相比在中国220/380 V电网条件下获得的测试结果重新测试。直接向IBNORCA和AE核验IBNORCA的IEC 62920 NB采纳状态和AE EMC许可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足玻利維亞的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在向AE或ENDE/分銷商提交項目前，從ILAC認可實驗室獲取針對具體逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。確認玻利維亞230/400 V電壓條件是否需要相比在中國220/380 V電網條件下獲得的測試結果重新測試。直接向IBNORCA和AE核驗IBNORCA的IEC 62920 NB採納狀態和AE EMC許可要求。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — Bolivia IBNORCA / AE Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——玻利维亚IBNORCA/AE要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——玻利維亞IBNORCA/AE要求

summary.en: GB/T 37408-2021 includes EMC testing requirements assessed at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. Chinese domestic EMC testing is not harmonised with IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 and is not accepted as equivalent by IBNORCA, AE, or Bolivia project owners and their independent engineers.
summary.zh: GB/T 37408-2021包含由CNAS认可的中国实验室评定的EMC测试要求。中国国内EMC测试未与IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2协调一致，不被IBNORCA、AE或玻利维亚项目业主及其独立工程师视为等同。
summary.zht: GB/T 37408-2021包含由CNAS認可的中國實驗室評定的EMC測試要求。中國國內EMC測試未與IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2協調一致，不被IBNORCA、AE或玻利維亞項目業主及其獨立工程師視為等同。
